author: Portfolio Operations
highlights: Identity Modernization workforce SSO pilot reached 92 percent enrollment with no severity-one incidents.
Mobile Redesign remains on track for the external beta design-partner cohort.
Analytics Platform Upgrade improved staging query performance by 34 percent.
risks: Cloud Migration customer API cutover rehearsal exceeded the planned maintenance window.
AI Search Rollout enterprise corpus expansion is waiting on permission-aware indexing review.
Analytics Platform Upgrade production backfill may saturate shared compute capacity.
blockers: API Services approval is needed for the revised Cloud Migration cutover sequence.
Security approval is needed for AI Search permission-aware document indexing.
Cloud Infrastructure must reserve an isolated compute pool for analytics backfill testing.
actions: Review the split Cloud Migration cutover plan and rollback rehearsal results by June 9.
Complete AI Search permission regression testing by June 15.
Reserve analytics backfill capacity and validate saturation alerts by June 17.
decisions: Approve the temporary Cloud Migration dual-run budget exception by June 11.
Confirm whether AI Search can proceed with a restricted enterprise beta corpus.
